description_long: This object consists of two stacked hardcover books bound together by a wide, brown leather strap. The books have dark, muted covers with a slightly worn texture, and the edges of the pages are visible, showing a subtle gradient of white and gray. The top book appears to have faint markings or text on its cover, while the bottom book's spine displays a partial title in white, serif lettering. The leather strap is wrapped tightly around the center, adding a rustic and utilitarian touch. The overall appearance suggests these are well-used, possibly vintage books, suitable for an urban environment such as a sidewalk book sale or a park bench. The books' surfaces are matte, with minimal reflectivity and a tactile, slightly rough finish.
description: Two stacked hardcover books bound by a brown leather strap, with worn covers and visible page edges. The books have a vintage, utilitarian look with a matte, slightly rough surface.
description_view_0: The view shows the books from the side, highlighting the layered white and gray page edges and the thickness of both volumes.
description_view_1: This view presents the books from the spine side, revealing the brown leather strap and partial white title text on the lower book's spine.
description_view_2: The opposite side view again emphasizes the stacked page edges, with the leather strap visible across the top cover.
description_view_3: The back view displays the plain, dark covers of both books and the central brown leather strap, with no visible text or illustration.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is gray with white serif text oriented horizontally, partially visible beneath the leather strap. There are no decorative patterns or additional embellishments.
